title: senecio renifolius
intro: Senecio renifolius, also known as woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, offering potential health benefits. The herb is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
